text:
Once there was a boy named Oliver who loved all things green. Everything in his garden glistened with leaves of silverish green.

Oliver was different. All his friends had bright reds and oranges. They talked about sports cars, sun-kisses on cheeks.

But Oliver was just happy chasing frogs.

Every night, he'd wait for them.

One night the green frog came with a shiny little glimmering nose.

"It's the greenest jewel there ever was."

They talked all night.

In the morning, they said it wouldn't hurt to explore the woods together?

The woods were dark. At first they just hid from the squirrels.

Then they stumbled upon the hidden glen.

Where the flowers were so pretty and bright.

They ran amongst them.

A hundred frogs chirped.

They were happy.

That's all.

They went back home.

And that's how Oliver learned the meaning of happiness.

A moment with a green glimmer.

They talked of dreams.

A dream
